changes: Unknown file types open the RAW binary importer
RAW importer: vertical/column-major byte layout
RAW importer: scrubbable Skip slider
Drag-and-drop support for opening font files and URL imports
New app menu for closing all fonts or resetting local storage
Fixed-size panes now persist position only
TTF/OTF embedded bitmap (sbit) font import via EBLC/EBDT tables
Multi-strike TTF bitmaps shown as font container
Dialog accessibility: focus trapping, Escape key, ARIA roles across all 13 dialogs
Shared FontWriteData interface for all font format writers
Fix PSF1 mode flag constants to match Linux kernel spec
Fix Windows FNT parser bounds checking for malformed files
Harden localStorage persistence against corrupted data
Font container support for multi-font files
CPI (Code Page Information) font format support
CPX (UPX-compressed CPI) font format support
Codepage 860 (Portuguese), 863 (Canadian French), and 865 (Nordic) character sets
Codepage 866 (Cyrillic), 848/1125 (Ukrainian), and 849/1131 (Belarusian) character sets
Codepage 3012 (Latvian RusLat) and Mac OS Roman character sets
Windows .FON container support (NE executable with FNT resources)
Fix Windows FNT v2 bitmap decoding for fonts wider than 8 pixels
Track original codepage and glyph byte index for round-trip support
Consistent Cancel/Save buttons across all property dialogs
Container table adapts columns to content and shows font preview
RAW binary font import with configurable options
Wang (WISCII) character set
Fixes to PCF and Windows FNT support
PC DOS EGA/VGA .COM font load and save
BBC Micro font load and save
Commodore 64 .64c font load
Selected codepage persists across page reloads
Recalculate All button in Glyph Metrics
CLI converter with named output formats
Atari 8-bit FNT font load and save
Amiga bitmap font load and save
PNG export support with various options
PNG import refinement with codepage mapping
Windows FNT font load and save
BASIC language export support
Keyboard shortcut help
PalmOS PDB font format load and save
PalmOS 3.3 codepage support
X11 PCF font format load and save
All font formats now support GZ compressed loading
Proportional font support in formats that support it
Atari ST GEM/GDOS FNT font format load and save
Larger fonts supported in preview window
Font name support
New Font dialog with size and codepage selection
FZX font format load and save
DOS CP437 and CP850 codepage support
Unicode-aware glyph remapping when switching codepage
Out-of-codepage glyphs shown with muted labels
CP/M Plus COM font load and save
Source code export: C#, TypeScript, hex ASM formats
Source code export: C, Rust, Z80, 6502, 68000, x86
BDF, PSF, YAFF, DRAW format support
TTF/WOFF export with variable font support
PNG import for sprite sheets
Font metrics: baseline, ascender, cap height, x-height, descender
Glyph editor with pixel tools and transforms
